requirements.text: Rover cruise speed shall not exceed 0.5 m/s during operation.
requirements.source: rover_test_v1.txt: 'the rover must not move faster than 0.5 m/s'

requirements.text: Contact force on the front bumper shall not exceed 1.0 N.
requirements.source: rover_test_v1.txt: 'do not push obstacles harder than 1 N'
